section_name: Transactions by electronic or telephonic means
text: The department is authorized to accept any application provided for under this chapter by electronic or telephonic means.
markdown:
### Chapter 322. Driver Licenses
##### § 322.70 — Transactions by electronic or telephonic means

The department is authorized to accept any application provided for under this chapter by electronic or telephonic means.

subsections.text: The department is authorized to accept any application provided for under this chapter by electronic or telephonic means.
